overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) depicting a player navigating a dystopian industrial district engulfed in an orange sandstorm. The player observes a group of NPCs before walking through destroyed urban streets and an industrial courtyard with large storage tanks, encountering scattered pedestrians in the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: destroyed street corner with concrete barrier and rubble

agents.ego_description: standing still near a concrete barrier, observing a group of three NPCs in the heavy orange haze

standing with arms crossed facing the player

large pile of concrete debris and twisted metal from destroyed buildings
destroyed industrial building with broken walls and exposed framework
fire burning in a barrel or debris pile emitting smoke

segments.scene_description: The player stands at a destroyed street corner during an orange sandstorm, observing three NPCs gathered near a concrete barrier. A fire burns in a barrel to the left while collapsed industrial ruins loom in the hazy background.

scene_state.functional_zone: deserted destroyed urban street with scattered debris

events.description: player turns away from the NPC group and begins walking down the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the destroyed street through heavy orange haze, leaving the NPC group behind

suspended electrical wires crossing between damaged buildings
overhead walkway or bridge connecting buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player begins walking down a deserted destroyed urban street, passing by damaged concrete buildings and overhead power lines. The concrete barrier and NPCs fall behind as the player moves deeper into the hazy industrial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street beneath overhead industrial bridge

events.description: passing under the overhead bridge structure which blocks the sky
pedestrians become visible walking ahead in the hazy distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered section of street beneath the overhead bridge, approaching other pedestrians in the distance

notable_agents.action: walking away from the player down the center of the street

entered.detail: metal and concrete overhead bridge connecting two buildings above the street
large diameter industrial pipes running along the building exterior

segments.scene_description: The player walks beneath an overhead bridge structure that blocks the sky, creating a more enclosed feeling. Large industrial pipes run along the left building as pedestrians appear in the hazy distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial courtyard with large storage tanks and work areas

approaching the group of NPCs gathered around the work table

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial courtyard past NPCs working and conversing near large storage tanks and work tables

standing guard near the large industrial tank wearing a wide-brimmed hat

metal scaffolding structure against the industrial tank

network of large pipes running overhead between structures

segments.scene_description: The player enters an industrial courtyard featuring massive storage tanks and metal scaffolding. Several NPCs are gathered around a central work table, with one leaning over it and another standing guard nearby. Overhead pipes crisscross between the industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial path leading away from the courtyard

events.description: exiting the industrial courtyard back into the open street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the open dirt path away from the industrial courtyard, following a distant pedestrian

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the player down the dirt path into the haze

entered.detail: large industrial warehouse building with metal siding
chain link fence running along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The player exits the industrial courtyard onto an open dirt path bordered by a metal fence and a large warehouse building. The industrial tanks and work area fall behind as the player follows a distant pedestrian deeper into the hazy industrial zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dystopian industrial district, moving from a ruined street corner into the heart of a hazy, orange sandstorm. It begins by observing a small group of NPCs gathered near a concrete barrier and a burning barrel amidst collapsed ruins. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a deserted urban street lined with damaged buildings and overhead power lines before passing beneath a heavy bridge structure that momentarily encloses the view. The path then opens into an industrial courtyard dominated by massive storage tanks and metal scaffolding where workers gather around a central table. Finally, the camera exits the courtyard onto an open dirt path bordered by a warehouse and metal fencing, following a distant pedestrian deeper into the orange haze.
